Policy sidebar

Audit restoration summary

Summary card that should not survive extraction.

Audit restoration matrix

Matrix helper that should not be included in the body.

Audit restoration checklist

Audit restoration checklists matter when operators need a deterministic sequence for rebuilding reservation evidence and waiver records after an incident stabilizes.

The checklist walks through exception triggers, dashboard checks, and reservation guarantees that should be validated before restored records are marked complete.

Teams are expected to compare regional recovery playbooks, reconcile missing reservation snapshots, and verify queue exports before reopening eligibility flows.

The guidance also emphasizes attaching restored audit artifacts to the same recovery record used for incident review and follow-up.
